creator: hakotani000@gmail.com
text:
ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon compile error.

gmake[3]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/daemon'
  CCLD     transmission-daemon
  CCLD     transmission-remote
./libtransmission/libtransmission.a(utils.o): In function `to_utf8':
/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/libtransmission/utils.c:1192: undefined reference to `libiconv_open'
/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/libtransmission/utils.c:1195: undefined reference to `libiconv'
/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/libtransmission/utils.c:1197: undefined reference to `libiconv_close'
./libtransmission/libtransmission.a(utils.o): In function `to_utf8':
/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/libtransmission/utils.c:1192: undefined reference to `libiconv_open'
/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/libtransmission/utils.c:1195: undefined reference to `libiconv'
/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/libtransmission/utils.c:1197: undefined reference to `libiconv_close'
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
gmake[3]: *** [transmission-daemon] Error 1
gmake[3]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[3]: *** [transmission-remote] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80/daemon'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/work/transmission-2.80'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.

Fix: 

may be libiconv need ?

Please add "-liconv " on LIBS in ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon/daemon/Makefile

transmission-daemon compile OK and work.

Thanks.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-daemon
make
